description: Absolutely stylish, comfortable and different, the puma Scrunch sneakers offer a barefoot feel while you enjoy those casual walks, reliving those wonderful childhood days. Team this with jeans or shorts for that cool, casual look.Upper Fabric upper for easy breathability, comfort and style Long fabric tongue with puma cat in screen print stretching across the lateral side to the tongue for comfort and style Lace-up system for snug Fit with trimmed lace panel for style and comfort Elasticated, trimmed collar for snug fit Rubber toe box for durability and forefoot protection Midsole Ecoortholite eco-friendly and breathable insole with moisture control and cushioning Cushioned footbed for all-day comfort Brand badge on back heel for style Outsole Durable rubber outsole with herringbone grooves in the forefoot and heel for maximum grip and traction
